description: Knowledge module registry — declares all modules, their status, and upstream sources

modules.name: Knowledge Mind
modules.description: Core memory system — mindmap, session management, near/far memory, domain JSONs, scripts

modules.name: Knowledge Documentation
modules.description: Web documentation system — viewer, publications, interfaces, webcards, methodology, scripts

modules.name: Knowledge Projects
modules.description: Project management module — tracking, planning, project lifecycle

modules.name: Knowledge Validation
modules.description: QA and validation module — task workflow, session protocol, metrics, integrity checks

modules.name: Knowledge GitHub
modules.description: GitHub integration module — issue tracking, PR workflows, project boards, sync

modules.name: Knowledge Tools
modules.description: Command framework and utilities module — command registry, help system, routing, operational scripts
